parameters: A visitor at this time...? I wonder who it could be.
When I opened the door... I found Rino nee-san standing there.
That's rare. Does she need something from me?
As I was thinking about this and that--
アニメーションタイプ = def
\se[23]\SM[jump]Evening~, \n[2]. Sorry for bothering you this late.
...I've got something to talk to your dad about. Work related.
\se[25-nb]\SA[130]I know I'm dressed like this but don't worry,
it's just a five minute thing.
As she said, she was in the getup she usually drank in, and the sight
of her holding documents with one arm like that didn't really fit it.
My old man got his room soundproofed a long time ago, so that his
hobby of watching movies didn't get in the way of my studies.
My voice shouldn't leak in either way, so as long as I don't make a
ruckus, it shouldn't get in their way.
\se[24-nb]Sorry, I'll definitely make it up to you next time, okay?
\SE[1]Fufufuh, how about I come to your room after I'm done, and
maybe we do some of 'that' kind of stuff together?
My room's just a normal one unlike my father's, so if we did that,
Shino would hear it next doo...
Wait, what does she mean by 'that' kind of stuff....?
\SE[1]Sorry for bothering you this late, chief. ...It's me, Rino.
Guess I'll just go chill in my room.
スライドスピード = def
After a while, she seemed to be done and left the house.
But when I looked at the time, it was almost midnight.
...They kept talking for longer than I thought they would.
She's a real hard worker, working even at this hour,
I prayed for her career to go places.
On that note, my old man... did he think nothing about seeing her
Maybe you just stop caring about those kinds of things once you're
that old. I still have a long ways to go before I become an adult myself...
The night went on as I sunk into thoughts like that.
Would you like to view [Rino's Viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)
This is my old man's room.

Whose nude body would you like to imagine?
...I've never seen Shino like that so I can't really imagine it.
